required_properties.description: The name of the product group.
The individual product variants in this group. Each variant must be a Product with its own offers.
The product attributes that vary between variants (e.g. 'color', 'size'). Use https://schema.org/size or custom properties.

recommended_properties.description: A description of the product group.
A representative image for the product group.
The brand of the product group.
The product group's SKU or identifier.
The URL of the product group page.
